Subtract obstacle intervals from a horizontal text band.

## Import

```ts
import { carveTextLineSlots } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function carveTextLineSlots(
	base: Interval,
	blocked: readonly Interval[],
	minSlotWidth = 0,
): Interval[]
```
